question: Q-p1v2-do-evidence-bound-typed-lessons-causally-improve-heldout-behavior
draft_reason: The hypothesis, arms, metrics, and kill conditions are fixed locally, but a server-owned LakatoTree prediction receipt, frozen outcome-module hashes, untouched split hash, exact token-budget manifest, neutral judge receipt, and injected-negative judge receipt do not yet exist.
hard_core_continuity: HSWM learning is judgment feedback that produces evidence-bound semantic state and changes later heldout behavior.
Promotion is immutable, gated, replayable, and non-destructive.
Efficacy requires equal-budget causal ablation; engineering execution alone is insufficient.

protective_belt_mutation.retired: global exact-answer scalar -> normalized winning-path credit -> tiny query-global slow-edge update
protective_belt_mutation.candidate: outcome evidence -> typed verdict -> evidence-bound lesson -> retrieved lesson context -> later model action
protective_belt_mutation.prohibited_rescue: Do not rerun P1 by changing eta, mu, top-k, or the promotion threshold alone.

conjecture: On a newly generated untouched PhantomWiki universe, a frozen answer model receiving evidence-bound typed lessons compiled only from prior training episodes improves heldout exact answer-set match over both equal-budget no-memory and raw-transcript memory arms. The gain disappears when lesson bindings are shuffled or lessons are removed, without exceeding the retention-loss cap.

L0_oracle_actuation_precondition.purpose: Prove that the proposed lesson action space can change heldout behavior before training a compiler.
L0_oracle_actuation_precondition.pass: At least one valid, training-evidence-derived oracle lesson changes a heldout model decision and improves exact set-match under exact call/token parity, while a contradicted injected lesson is refused or measurably harms the targeted item.
L0_oracle_actuation_precondition.kill: If no valid oracle lesson changes any heldout decision, stop. The answer interface or retrieval binding is inert; L1 is forbidden.

L1_causal_learning.purpose: Test whether learned typed lessons add causal value beyond transcript access and token budget.

L2_agent_transfer.purpose: Expose Agent A's immutable lesson artifact to frozen Agent B on disjoint tasks.
L2_agent_transfer.depends_on: L1 passes both typed-minus-no-memory and typed-minus-raw-transcript primary margins.
L2_agent_transfer.claim_boundary: Not authorized by this preregistration; requires a separate server registration.

arms.T1_typed_lesson: Prior training outcomes are compiled into schema-valid verdict and lesson records with evidence IDs, scope, polarity, confidence, supersession target, and forbidden-use constraints. Only admitted lessons are retrieved.
arms.T2_raw_transcript: Same prior episode evidence in minimally transformed transcript form, retrieved under the same retrieval budget and padded to exact input-token parity.
arms.T3_no_memory: No prior episode information. Inert tokens with no task semantics preserve exact input-token and model-call parity.
arms.T4_shuffled_or_removed: Half the evaluation blocks use lesson-to-task bindings shuffled within the frozen split; half remove admitted lessons and replace them with inert parity padding.

prediction.credence_note: The action space is supported by prior agent-memory literature, but no HSWM typed-lesson causal result exists and P1's prior scalar belt was null.

comparison_interpretation.T1_beats_T3_but_not_T2: Operational compression only. Do not claim HSWM-specific learning and keep P2 closed.
comparison_interpretation.T1_beats_T3_and_T2_and_T4: P1v2 causal lesson-learning result; permits a separate P2 transfer preregistration.
comparison_interpretation.T1_fails_T3_and_T2: Retain compiler plus safe graph-memory claim; stop P2, P3, and P4.
comparison_interpretation.T4_not_worse_than_T1: Lesson binding is non-causal or leaks task identity; reject the lesson mechanism.

equal_compute_lock.model: same frozen model ID, revision, serving arguments, temperature, seed policy, and maximum output tokens in every arm
equal_compute_lock.calls: exact same logical and physical model-call count in every arm
equal_compute_lock.input_tokens: exact per-item tokenizer-count parity via inert non-semantic padding; arm labels are hidden from the model
equal_compute_lock.output_tokens: same maximum and stop policy; actual output-token counts are reported by arm
equal_compute_lock.retrieval: same candidate count, top-k, embedding model/revision, and retrieval-call count
equal_compute_lock.latency: reported but not a success metric
equal_compute_lock.gold: heldout gold is opened only by the environment after the answer is sealed

data_lock.universe: new PhantomWiki universe; the seed-1 P1 universe and all 390 previously inspected eligible questions are forbidden
data_lock.proposed_generation: phantom-wiki 1.0.3, same scale flags as P1, seed 2, friendship-seed 2
data_lock.preflight: eligibility counts and schema validity only; no arm answer, reward, recall, delta, or verdict may be inspected
data_lock.split: training, lesson-calibration, heldout target, and retention canary IDs are disjoint and content-addressed
data_lock.future_information_refusal: lesson compiler and retriever must reject future episode IDs, heldout answer values, evaluation labels, and gold-derived strings

judge_lock.measurement_artifact: must contain observations and provenance but no verdict field
judge_lock.judge: separate pure deterministic LakatoTree judge, not imported by or callable from the measurement harness
required_receipts: server-owned prediction receipt and live experiment tag
exact measured command, cwd, git commit, module hashes, split hash, model deployment hash, and budget hash
judge_lock.publication: Only the judge output may say progressive, equivalent, rejected, or degenerating.

kill_conditions: K1: L0 oracle actuation precondition fails -> stop before compiler learning.
K2: either primary contrast is <= 0.03 or its paired-bootstrap 95% lower bound is <= 0 -> no P1v2 causal-learning claim.
K3: T1-T4 < 0.02 -> lesson content or binding is not causal.
K4: retention loss > 0.02 -> stop and repair admission/supersession before retry.
K5: any model/call/token/retrieval/split/gold parity violation -> void the run.
K6: any future ID, heldout answer, evaluation label, or gold-derived string enters a lesson -> void the run and quarantine all outputs.
K7: T1 beats T3 but not T2 -> classify as compression only and keep transfer/topology/consolidation closed.
void_conditions: measurement begins before registration_state becomes SERVER_REGISTERED_FROZEN_UNRUN
measurement code emits or imports a scientific verdict
the neutral judge cannot reject the injected-negative fixture
any outcome-affecting module, split, prompt, budget, or deployment hash changes after registration
any previously inspected P1 heldout question is reused

scope_boundary.claimed_if_passed: causal heldout improvement from an evidence-bound typed lesson plane on one synthetic universe
not_claimed: Agent A to Agent B transfer

measurement_forbidden_until: server experiment tag and prediction receipt are retrievable
all outcome-affecting module hashes are frozen
new universe and disjoint split manifests are frozen
exact parity budget manifest is frozen
neutral judge and injected-negative receipts pass
